name: occupancy: no rate row matches the chosen occupancy → fail closed, no price quoted, no positional fallback (F19)
comment: The property has only a Couple rate configured. The guest answers '1' (Single), for which no WS_Rates row exists. The old activeRates[0] behaviour would have quoted the Couple rate (R400) to a solo guest by position — exactly the silent mispricing F19 exists to stop. Fail closed: no Rate Applied / Amount Due is written to the booking (the single guest-only write below is the proof — there is NO booking update), and the guest is routed to a contact-the-owner message rather than a price. The session still advances to AWAITING_ETA so the already-notified booking can complete with the owner pricing it offline.
